summary: Completed comprehensive testing of King of the Hill Movie Game feature. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All game flows verified - modal opens, game starts, movie selection works, King badge displays, progress bar updates, Skip/Can't Decide buttons work, game completes at round 10 with recommendations.

issues: Console warning: AnimatePresence mode='wait' with multiple children - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/game/start returns session_id
Backend: POST /api/game/start returns round 1
Backend: POST /api/game/start returns two movies
Backend: POST /api/game/start returns max_rounds = 10
Backend: POST /api/game/start king_position is null in round 1
Backend: POST /api/game/choose progresses to next round
Backend: POST /api/game/choose king stays on left position
Backend: POST /api/game/choose returns current_scores
Backend: Fast reaction time (<2s) gives high multiplier
Backend: Super like applies 2x multiplier
Backend: POST /api/game/skip gives fresh matchup with no king
Backend: POST /api/game/skip returns two new movies
Backend: POST /api/game/cant-decide gives equal points to both
Backend: POST /api/game/cant-decide keeps king if exists
Backend: Game ends at round 10 with recommendations
Backend: Invalid session returns 404
Backend: Skip with invalid session returns 404
Backend: Game works without auth (uses TMDB trending)
Frontend: Game button in floating nav (Gamepad2 icon) opens modal
Frontend: Start Game button initiates game
Frontend: Two movie cards displayed side by side
Frontend: Movie cards are clickable
Frontend: King badge shows on winner (left position)
Frontend: Progress bar updates with round progression
Frontend: Current Leaders section shows top scoring movies
Frontend: Reaction time indicator shows (e.g., '5.5s Hesitant')
Frontend: Skip button works - gives fresh matchup
Frontend: Can't Decide button works
Frontend: Game completes at round 10
Frontend: Results screen shows 'Your Perfect Movies' with top 3
Frontend: Results show confidence percentage and TMDB rating
Frontend: Play Again button visible on results screen
Frontend: Toast notification 'Game complete in 10 rounds!'
critical_code_review_comments: Game session storage is in-memory (game_sessions dict) - sessions will be lost on server restart. Consider persisting to MongoDB for production.
Reaction time multiplier logic is well-implemented: <1s=3x, <2s=2.5x, <3s=2x, <4s=1.5x, <5s=1x, >5s=0.5x
Super like correctly applies 2x on top of reaction multiplier
King of the Hill logic works correctly - winner stays on left, challenger replaces loser
Movie pool sources from user's Diary/Watchlist first, then falls back to TMDB trending/similar
AnimatePresence warning in console is cosmetic - consider changing mode from 'wait' to 'sync' if needed
seed_data_creation: Test user gametest2 created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: King of the Hill Movie Game feature fully tested and working. Key points: 1) Game accessed via Gamepad2 icon in floating nav (data-testid='nav-game-btn'). 2) Backend uses in-memory game_sessions dict for session storage. 3) Reaction time scoring: fast (<2s) = high multiplier (up to 3x), slow (>5s) = low multiplier (0.5x). 4) Super like adds 2x multiplier. 5) Skip resets king and gives fresh matchup. 6) Can't Decide gives equal points to both movies. 7) Game ends at round 10 with top 3 recommendations based on accumulated scores. 8) Test user: gametest2@test.com / test123.
